title: Skofitzia boliviana
taxonomy: Skofitzia boliviana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is part of the genus Skofitzia. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. Skofitzia boliviana is native to Bolivia, where it grows in the wild. More research is needed to fully understand its classification and taxonomic relationships within the Asteraceae family.
